Package me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config

Class ConfigFolderManager

java.lang.Object
me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config.ConfigFolderManager
public class ConfigFolderManager extends Object
Manages multiple configuration folder by mapping them to an String. This class provides utility functions to save, reload, and retrieve configurations efficiently.
Since:
0.2.2
Author:
ItzLoghotXD

  • Constructor Details

    • ConfigFolderManager

      public ConfigFolderManager(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Constructs a new ConfigFolderManager.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The plugin instance using this manager

  • Method Details

    • load

      public void load()
      Loads all registered configuration folders.

    • save

      public void save()
      Saves all registered configuration folders.

    • save

      public void save(String... configFolder)
      Saves a specific configuration folder.
      Parameters:
      configFolder - The String key associated with the configuration folder.

    • reload

      public void reload()
      Reloads all registered configuration folders.

    • reload

      public void reload(String... configFolder)
      Reloads a specific configuration folder.
      Parameters:
      configFolder - The String key associated with the configuration folder.

    • register

      public void register(ConfigFolderHandler... configFolders)
      Registers configuration folder in the manager.
      Parameters:
      configFolders - The ConfigFolderHandler instance to associate with its name.

    • has

      public boolean has(String configFolder)
      Checks if a configuration folder is registered.
      Parameters:
      configFolder - The String key associated with the configuration folder.
      Returns:
      True if the configuration folder is registered, false otherwise.

    • getConfig

      public org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration getConfig(String configFolder, String configFile)
      Retrieves the FileConfiguration associated with a registered configuration file.
      Parameters:
      configFolder - The String key associated with the configuration folder.
      configFile - The String key associated with the configuration file. (relative to configFolder)
      Returns:
      The FileConfiguration instance.
